apps/api/test/hmac-security.e2e-spec.ts:23: * 计算 HMAC-SHA256 签名
apps/api/test/hmac-security.e2e-spec.ts:25: * 注意：与 hmac-signature.interceptor.ts:107 对齐
apps/api/test/hmac-security.e2e-spec.ts:33:  timestamp: string,

lt("Metrics are not yet supported for Accelerate",{clientVersion:this.clientVersion})}async withRetry(t){for(let r=0;;r++){let n=i=>{this.logEmitter.emit("info",{message:`Calling ${i} this.dataloader.request(t)}catch(r){let{clientMethod:n,callsite:i,transaction:o,args:s,modelName:a}=t;this.handleAndLogRequestError({error:r,clientMethod:n,callsite:i,transaction:o,args:s,modelName:a,globalOmit:t.globalOmit})}}mapQueryEngineResult({dataPath:t,unpacker:r},n){let i=n?.data,o=n?.elapsed,s=this.unpack(i,t,r);return y.env.PRISMA_CLIENT_GET_TIME?{data:s,elapsed:o}:s}handleAndLogRequestError(t){try{this.handleRequestError(t)}catch(r){throw this.logEmitter&&this.logEmitter.emit("error",{message:r.message,target:t.clientMethod,timestamp:new Date}),r}}handleRequestError({error:t,clientMethod:r,callsite:n,transaction:i,args:o,modelName:s,globalOmit:a}){if(lp(t),cp(t,i)||t instanceof Me)throw t;if(t instanceof W&&pp(t)){let u=Gs(t.meta);Sr({args:o,errors:[u],callsite:n,errorFormat:this.client._errorFormat,originalMethod:r,clientVersion:this.client._clientVersion,globalOmit:a})}let l=t.message;if(n&&(l=ut({callsite:n,originalMethod:r,isPanic:t.isPanic,showColors:this.client._errorFormat==="pretty",message:l})),l=this.sanitizeMessage(l),t.code){let u=s?{modelName:s,...t.meta}:t.meta;throw new W(l,{code:t.code,clientVersion:this.client._clientVersion,meta:u,batchRequestIdx:t.batchRequestIdx})}else{if(t.isPanic)throw new ue(l,this.client._clientVersion);if(t instanceof K)throw new K(l,{clientVersion:this.client._clientVersion,batchRequestIdx:t.batchRequestIdx});if(t instanceof V)throw new V(l,this.client._clientVersion);if(t instanceof ue)throw new ue(l,this.client._clientVersion)}throw t.clientVersion=this.client._clientVersion,t}sanitizeMessage(t){return this.client._errorFormat&&this.client._errorFormat!=="pretty"?(0,Qs.default)(t):t}unpack(t,r,n){if(!t||(t.data&&(t=t.data),!t))return t;let i=Object.keys(t)[0],o=Object.values(t)[0],s=r.filter(u=>u!=="select"&&u!=="include"),a=Nn(o,s),l=i==="queryRaw"?Vs(a):ot(a);return n?n(l):l}get[Symbol.toStringTag](){return"RequestHandler"}};function up(e){if(e){if(e.kind==="batch")return{kind:"batch",options:{isolationLevel:e.isolationLevel}};if(e.kind==="itx")return{kind:"itx",options:Js(e)};Fe(e,"Unknown transaction kind")}}function Js(e){return{id:e.id,payload:e.payload}}function cp(e,t){return Ur(e)&&t?.kind==="batch"&&e.batchRequestIdx!==t.index}function pp(e){return e.code==="P2009"||e.code==="P2012"}function Gs(e){if(e.kind==="Union")return{kind:"Union",errors:e.errors.map(Gs)};if(Array.isArray(e.selectionPath)){let[,...t]=e.selectionPath;return{...e,selectionPath:t}}return e}m();c();p();d();f();var Ws="5.22.0";var Ks=Ws;m();c();p();d();f();var Xs=he(En());m();c();p();d();f();var B=class extends Error{constructor(t){super(t+`
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:262:  nonce: 'nonce',
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:264:  timestamp: 'timestamp',
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:436:  timestamp: 'timestamp'
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:553:  nonce: 'nonce',
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:554:  signature: 'signature',
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:555:  timestamp: 'timestamp',
packages/database/src/generated/prisma/index.js:990:  "inlineSchema": "// Prisma Schema for 毛毛虫宇宙 (Super Caterpillar Universe)\n// Based on PLAN - STEP 2: Prisma Schema 顶层结构规划\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n  output   = \"../src/generated/prisma\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 用户体系 (User System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel User {\n  id                    String   @id @default(uuid())\n  email                 String   @unique\n  passwordHash          String\n  avatar                String?\n  userType              UserType @default(individual)\n  role                  UserRole @default(viewer)\n  tier                  UserTier @default(Free)\n  quota                 Json? // { remainingTokens, computeSeconds, credits }\n  defaultOrganizationId String? // Studio v0.7: 默认组织 ID\n  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  memberships         Membership[]         @relation(\"UserMemberships\")\n  ownedProjects       Project[]            @relation(\"ProjectOwner\")\n  ownedOrganizations  Organization[]       @relation(\"OrganizationOwner\")\n  billingEvents       BillingEvent[]       @relation(\"BillingEventUser\")\n  reviewLogs          PublishingReview[]   @relation(\"ReviewerUser\")\n  organizationMembers OrganizationMember[] @relation(\"UserOrganizationMember\") // Studio v0.7\n  apiKeys             ApiKey[]             @relation(\"UserApiKeys\") // API Key 关联\n  auditLogs           AuditLog[]           @relation(\"UserAuditLogs\") // 审计日志关联\n\n  @@map(\"users\")\n}\n\nmodel Organization {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  name      String\n  ownerId   String\n  slug      String?  @unique // Studio v0.7: 可选，用于 URL 或内部标识\n  quota     Json? // { credits, computeSeconds, maxRenderTasks, maxFixAttempts }\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  owner         User                 @relation(\"OrganizationOwner\", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])\n  memberships   Membership[]         @relation(\"OrganizationMemberships\")\n  members       OrganizationMember[] @relation(\"OrganizationMembers\") // Studio v0.7\n  projects      Project[]            @relation(\"OrganizationProjects\")\n  shots         Shot[]               @relation(\"OrganizationShots\") // Studio v0.7\n  shotJobs      ShotJob[]            @relation(\"OrganizationShotJobs\") // Studio v0.7\n  tasks         Task[]               @relation(\"OrganizationTasks\") // Studio v0.8: 平台任务\n  costCenters   CostCenter[]         @relation(\"OrganizationCostCenters\")\n  apiKeys       ApiKey[]             @relation(\"OrganizationApiKeys\") // API Key 关联\n  billingEvents BillingEvent[]       @relation(\"BillingEventOrganization\")\n\n  @@map(\"organizations\")\n}\n\nmodel Membership {\n  id             String         @id @default(uuid())\n  userId         String\n  organizationId String\n  role           MembershipRole\n  permissions    Json? // { projectPermissions: { projectId: [read, write, generate, publish, manage] } }\n  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  user         User         @relation(\"UserMemberships\", fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationMemberships\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n\n  @@unique([userId, organizationId])\n  @@map(\"memberships\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 项目体系 (Project System - 五层内容结构)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel Project {\n  id             String        @id @default(uuid())\n  name           String\n  description    String?\n  ownerId        String\n  organizationId String // Studio v0.7: 所属组织（必填，不再可选）\n  status         ProjectStatus @default(in_progress)\n  metadata       Json? // { timeline, progress, settings }\n  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  owner                  User                    @relation(\"ProjectOwner\", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])\n  organization           Organization            @relation(\"OrganizationProjects\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)\n  seasons                Season[]                @relation(\"ProjectSeasons\") // 影视工业标准：Project → Season → Episode\n  episodes               Episode[]               @relation(\"ProjectEpisodes\") // @deprecated 保留用于向下兼容\n  billingEvents          BillingEvent[]          @relation(\"BillingEventProject\")\n  engineTasks            EngineTask[]            @relation(\"ProjectEngineTask\")\n  tasks                  Task[]                  @relation(\"ProjectTasks\") // Studio v0.8: 平台任务\n  novelSources           NovelSource[]           @relation(\"ProjectNovelSources\") // Studio: 小说导入\n  novelAnalysisJobs      NovelAnalysisJob[]      @relation(\"ProjectNovelAnalysisJobs\") // Studio: 小说分析任务\n  shotJobs               ShotJob[]               @relation(\"ProjectShotJobs\") // ShotJob 关联\n  projectMembers         ProjectMember[]\n  structureQualityReport StructureQualityReport? @relation(\"ProjectQualityReport\")\n  novelParseResults      NovelParseResult[]      @relation(\"ProjectNovelParseResults\")\n  qualityMetrics         QualityMetrics[]        @relation(\"ProjectQualityMetrics\")\n\n  @@map(\"projects\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 影视工业标准层级：Season（季/部）\n// @deprecated 根据 DBSpec V1.1，应使用四层结构（Project → Episode → Scene → Shot）\n// 保留此模型用于向后兼容，新代码应直接使用 Project → Episode 关联\n// ============================================\n\nmodel Season {\n  id          String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId   String\n  index       Int // 季序号（从 1 开始）\n  title       String // 季标题\n  description String?  @db.Text // 季描述\n  metadata    Json?    @default(\"{}\") // 额外元数据\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project  Project   @relation(\"ProjectSeasons\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  episodes Episode[] @relation(\"SeasonEpisodes\")\n\n  @@unique([projectId, index])\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@map(\"seasons\")\n}\n\nmodel Episode {\n  id        String  @id @default(uuid())\n  seasonId  String\n  projectId String?\n  index     Int\n  name      String\n  summary   String?\n  chapterId String? @unique\n\n  season            Season             @relation(\"SeasonEpisodes\", fields: [seasonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  project           Project?           @relation(\"ProjectEpisodes\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  scenes            Scene[]            @relation(\"EpisodeScenes\")\n  shotJobs          ShotJob[]          @relation(\"EpisodeShotJobs\")\n  chapter           NovelChapter?      @relation(\"ChapterEpisode\", fields: [chapterId], references: [id])\n  publishingReviews PublishingReview[] @relation(\"EpisodePublishingReview\")\n\n  @@map(\"episodes\")\n}\n\nmodel Scene {\n  id                 String  @id @default(uuid())\n  episodeId          String\n  index              Int\n  title              String\n  summary            String?\n  // V1.1: 角色 ID 列表（语义层面），存 JSON\n  characters         Json?\n  // V1.1: 视觉密度评分\n  visualDensityScore Float?\n  // V1.1: 文本增强结果\n  enrichedText       String? @db.Text\n\n  episode      Episode      @relation(\"EpisodeScenes\", fields: [episodeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  shots        Shot[]       @relation(\"SceneShots\")\n  shotJobs     ShotJob[]    @relation(\"SceneShotJobs\")\n  engineTasks  EngineTask[] @relation(\"SceneEngineTask\")\n  sceneDraft   SceneDraft?  @relation(\"SceneDraftScene\", fields: [sceneDraftId], references: [id])\n  sceneDraftId String?      @unique\n\n  // 兼容项目级索引需求（Spec: scenes(project_id,index)）\n  projectId String?\n\n  @@index([projectId, index])\n  @@map(\"scenes\")\n}\n\nmodel Shot {\n  id              String    @id @default(uuid())\n  sceneId         String\n  index           Int\n  title           String?\n  description     String?\n  type            String\n  params          Json      @default(\"{}\")\n  qualityScore    Json      @default(\"{}\")\n  reviewedAt      DateTime?\n  durationSeconds Int?\n  organizationId  String?\n  // V1.1: 文本增强后的镜头 prompt\n  enrichedPrompt  String?   @db.Text\n\n  scene             Scene              @relation(\"SceneShots\", fields: [sceneId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  organization      Organization?      @relation(\"OrganizationShots\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n  engineTasks       EngineTask[]       @relation(\"ShotEngineTask\")\n  qualityScores     QualityScore[]     @relation(\"ShotQualityScore\")\n  safetyResults     SafetyResult[]     @relation(\"ShotSafetyResult\")\n  publishingReviews PublishingReview[] @relation(\"ShotPublishingReview\")\n  jobs              ShotJob[]          @relation(\"ShotJobs\")\n  shotPlanning      ShotPlanning?      @relation(\"ShotPlanning\")\n\n  @@index([sceneId, index])\n  @@map(\"shots\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Stage4: Semantic Enhancement / Shot Planning / Structure QA\n// ============================================\n\nmodel SemanticEnhancement {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  nodeType      String\n  nodeId        String\n  data          Json\n  engineKey     String\n  engineVersion String?\n  confidence    Float?\n\n  @@unique([nodeType, nodeId])\n  @@index([nodeType, nodeId])\n  @@map(\"semantic_enhancements\")\n}\n\nmodel ShotPlanning {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId    String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  data          Json\n  engineKey     String\n  engineVersion String?\n  confidence    Float?\n\n  shot Shot @relation(\"ShotPlanning\", fields: [shotId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"shot_plannings\")\n}\n\nmodel StructureQualityReport {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  data          Json\n  engineKey     String\n  engineVersion String?\n\n  project Project @relation(\"ProjectQualityReport\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"structure_quality_reports\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 引擎体系 (EngineHub System)\n// ============================================\n\n// 注意：EngineTask 保留用于向后兼容，新代码应使用 Task 模型\n// EngineTask 主要用于引擎层面的任务记录（scene_parse, shot_plan 等）\nmodel EngineTask {\n  id            String           @id @default(uuid())\n  type          EngineTaskType\n  projectId     String\n  sceneId       String?\n  shotId        String?\n  input         Json // EngineInput { text, projectId, episodeId, sceneId?, historyContext? }\n  output        Json? // EngineOutput { sceneSummary?, shotPlan?, enrichData? }\n  engineVersion String\n  status        EngineTaskStatus @default(pending)\n  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime         @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project Project @relation(\"ProjectEngineTask\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  scene   Scene?  @relation(\"SceneEngineTask\", fields: [sceneId], references: [id])\n  shot    Shot?   @relation(\"ShotEngineTask\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"engine_tasks\")\n}\n\n// S3-B.1: Engine 配置存储（数据库驱动）\nmodel Engine {\n  id             String          @id @default(uuid())\n  engineKey      String          @unique\n  adapterName    String\n  adapterType    String\n  config         Json\n  enabled        Boolean         @default(true)\n  version        String?\n  // S3-B.2: 引擎版本体系\n  defaultVersion String?\n  versions       EngineVersion[]\n  createdAt      DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime        @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"engines\")\n}\n\n// S3-B.2: Engine 版本表\nmodel EngineVersion {\n  id            String   @id @default(uuid())\n  engine        Engine   @relation(fields: [engineId], references: [id])\n  engineId      String\n  versionName   String\n  config        Json\n  enabled       Boolean  @default(true)\n  rolloutWeight Int?\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  @@unique([engineId, versionName])\n  @@map(\"engine_versions\")\n}\n\n/// Nonce 防重放存储（HMAC 安全）\nmodel NonceStore {\n  id        String    @id @default(uuid())\n  nonce     String\n  apiKey    String\n  timestamp BigInt\n  usedAt    DateTime?\n  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())\n\n  @@unique([nonce, apiKey])\n  @@map(\"nonce_store\")\n}\n\n// RBAC 基础表\nmodel Role {\n  id        String           @id @default(uuid())\n  name      String           @unique\n  level     Int\n  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime         @updatedAt\n  members   ProjectMember[]\n  rolePerms RolePermission[]\n\n  @@map(\"roles\")\n}\n\nmodel Permission {\n  id        String           @id @default(uuid())\n  key       String           @unique\n  scope     String // system | project\n  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime         @updatedAt\n  rolePerms RolePermission[]\n\n  @@map(\"permissions\")\n}\n\nmodel RolePermission {\n  id           String   @id @default(uuid())\n  roleId       String\n  permissionId String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n\n  role       Role       @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  permission Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])\n  @@map(\"role_permissions\")\n}\n\nmodel ProjectMember {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  userId    String\n  projectId String\n  roleId    String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  project Project @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  role    Role    @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([userId, projectId])\n  @@map(\"project_members\")\n}\n\n// 审计日志（Append-only）\nmodel AuditLogLegacy {\n  id           String   @id @default(uuid())\n  userId       String?\n  orgId        String?\n  action       String\n  resourceType String?\n  resourceId   String?\n  traceId      String\n  ip           String?\n  ua           String?\n  timestamp    DateTime @default(now())\n  details      Json?\n  immutable    Boolean  @default(true)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([resourceId])\n  @@index([action])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n  @@map(\"audit_log\")\n  @@ignore\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 任务与调度体系 (TaskSystem & WorkerPool)\n// ============================================\n\n// Task（平台级任务）\n// 定义：跨 Worker、跨重试、带业务语义的任务\n// 职责：包含任务类型、业务对象关联、重试策略、优先级等平台级元信息\n// 关系：Task → Job（一个 Task 可以产生多个 Job，用于重试）\nmodel Task {\n  id             String     @id @default(uuid())\n  organizationId String\n  projectId      String\n  type           TaskType\n  status         TaskStatus @default(PENDING)\n  payload        Json?\n  output         Json? // 任务输出结果，Engine/Worker 执行完成后写入\n  attempts       Int        @default(0)\n  maxRetry       Int        @default(3)\n  retryCount     Int        @default(0)\n  error          String?\n  workerId       String? // 实际执行该 Task 的 Worker 节点 ID\n  traceId        String? // Stage13-Final: Pipeline 级 traceId（用于 CE Core Layer 审计追溯）\n  createdAt      DateTime   @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime   @updatedAt\n\n  jobs ShotJob[] @relation(\"TaskJobs\")\n\n  project      Project      @relation(\"ProjectTasks\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationTasks\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n  worker       WorkerNode?  @relation(\"TaskWorker\", fields: [workerId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([status, createdAt])\n}\n\n// WorkerJob（Worker 执行记录）\n// 定义：Worker 维度的一次具体执行记录\n// 职责：记录 Worker 执行任务的过程和结果\n// 关系：WorkerJob 与 Task/Job 是不同层面的概念，WorkerJob 主要用于 Worker 内部调度和计费\nmodel WorkerJob {\n  id            String          @id @default(uuid())\n  type          WorkerJobType\n  payload       Json // { taskData, params, modelInfo }\n  status        WorkerJobStatus @default(pending)\n  workerId      String?\n  retryCount    Int             @default(0)\n  traceId       String\n  jobId         String          @unique // BullMQ jobId\n  engineVersion String?\n  modelVersion  String?\n  createdAt     DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime        @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  worker        WorkerNode?    @relation(\"WorkerNodeJobs\", fields: [workerId], references: [id])\n  billingEvents BillingEvent[] @relation(\"BillingEventJob\")\n\n  @@map(\"worker_jobs\")\n}\n\n// Job（Worker 执行单元）\n// 定义：某个 Worker 在某个时间执行某个 Task 的一次尝试\n// 职责：记录单次执行的状态、结果、错误信息等\n// 关系：Job 属于某个 Task（taskId），一个 Task 可以产生多个 Job（用于重试）\n// Studio v0.2: Shot 生成任务模型\n// Studio v0.4: 增强队列化处理能力\n// Studio v0.8: 引入 Task 层，Job 关联 Task\nmodel ShotJob {\n  id             String    @id @default(uuid())\n  organizationId String\n  projectId      String\n  episodeId      String\n  sceneId        String\n  shotId         String\n  taskId         String?\n  workerId       String?\n  status         JobStatus @default(PENDING)\n  type           JobType\n  priority       Int       @default(0)\n  maxRetry       Int       @default(3)\n  retryCount     Int       @default(0)\n  attempts       Int       @default(0)\n  payload        Json?\n  engineConfig   Json?\n  lastError      String?\n  traceId        String? // Stage13: 用于 CE Core Layer 审计追溯\n  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  shot         Shot         @relation(\"ShotJobs\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n  task         Task?        @relation(\"TaskJobs\", fields: [taskId], references: [id])\n  worker       WorkerNode?  @relation(\"WorkerNodeShotJobs\", fields: [workerId], references: [id])\n  project      Project      @relation(\"ProjectShotJobs\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  episode      Episode      @relation(\"EpisodeShotJobs\", fields: [episodeId], references: [id])\n  scene        Scene        @relation(\"SceneShotJobs\", fields: [sceneId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationShotJobs\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel WorkerNode {\n  id            String       @id @default(uuid())\n  workerId      String       @unique\n  name          String? // Worker 名称（可选）\n  status        WorkerStatus @default(offline)\n  gpuCount      Int          @default(0)\n  gpuMemory     Int          @default(0)\n  gpuType       String       @default(\"unknown\")\n  tasksRunning  Int          @default(0)\n  temperature   Float?\n  capabilities  Json         @default(\"{}\") // { supportedJobTypes[], supportedModels[], maxBatchSize }\n  lastHeartbeat DateTime     @default(now())\n  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  jobs     WorkerJob[] @relation(\"WorkerNodeJobs\")\n  shotJobs ShotJob[]   @relation(\"WorkerNodeShotJobs\") // Orchestrator Stage2: 关联 ShotJob\n  tasks    Task[]      @relation(\"TaskWorker\") // S1-FIX-A: Task 关联 Worker\n\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"worker_nodes\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 模型宇宙体系 (Model Universe System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel ModelRegistry {\n  id                 String    @id @default(uuid())\n  name               String\n  type               ModelType\n  version            String\n  changelog          String?\n  compatibleEngines  Json // { engines: [CE01, CE02, ...] }\n  performanceMetrics Json? // { latency, accuracy, cost }\n  fineTuneInfo       Json? // { method, dataset, params }\n  seed               String?\n  createdAt          DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  @@unique([name, version])\n  @@map(\"model_registry\")\n}\n\nmodel TemplatePreset {\n  id        String       @id @default(uuid())\n  type      TemplateType\n  name      String\n  preset    Json // 根据类型不同，包含 pose 参数、camera 参数、style 参数\n  createdAt DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"template_presets\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 质量与安全体系 (Quality & Safety System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel QualityScore {\n  id                 String   @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId             String\n  visualDensityScore Float\n  consistencyScore   Float\n  motionScore        Float\n  clarityScore       Float\n  aestheticScore     Float\n  overallScore       Float\n  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  shot Shot @relation(\"ShotQualityScore\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"quality_scores\")\n}\n\nmodel SafetyResult {\n  id           String       @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId       String\n  textScore    Float\n  imageScore   Float\n  riskLevel    RiskLevel\n  reviewStatus ReviewStatus @default(require_human_review)\n  createdAt    DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  shot Shot @relation(\"ShotSafetyResult\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"safety_results\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 商业化体系 (Billing System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel BillingEvent {\n  id                 String           @id @default(uuid())\n  eventType          BillingEventType\n  userId             String\n  organizationId     String?\n  projectId          String?\n  jobId              String?\n  amount             Float\n  creditsConsumed    Float\n  computeSecondsUsed Float\n  gpuCost            Float\n  modelCost          Float\n  storageCost        Float\n  totalCost          Float\n  billingStatus      BillingStatus    @default(pending)\n  invoiceId          String?\n  timestamp          DateTime         @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user         User          @relation(\"BillingEventUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization? @relation(\"BillingEventOrganization\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n  project      Project?      @relation(\"BillingEventProject\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  job          WorkerJob?    @relation(\"BillingEventJob\", fields: [jobId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"billing_events\")\n}\n\nmodel CostCenter {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  organizationId String\n  name           String\n  budget         Float\n  currentCost    Float    @default(0)\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationCostCenters\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"cost_centers\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 发布体系 (Publishing System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel PublishingReview {\n  id         String       @id @default(uuid())\n @@map(\"publishing_reviews\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Enums\n// ============================================\n\nenum UserType {\n  individual\n  organization_member\n  admin\n\n  @@map(\"user_type\")\n}\n\nenum UserRole {\n  viewer\n  editor\n  creator\n  admin\n\n  @@map(\"user_role\")\n}\n\nenum UserTier {\n  Free\n  Pro\n  Studio\n  Enterprise\n\n  @@map(\"user_tier\")\n}\n\nenum MembershipRole {\n  Owner\n  Editor\n  Creator\n  Viewer\n\n  @@map(\"membership_role\")\n}\n\nenum ProjectStatus {\n  in_progress\n  completed\n\n  @@map(\"project_status\")\n}\n\nenum ShotStatus {\n  DRAFT\n  READY\n  GENERATING\n  GENERATED\n  FAILED\n  // Legacy statuses (保持向后兼容)\n  pending\n  running\n  success\n  fail\n  need_fix\n\n  @@map(\"shot_status\")\n}\n\nenum ShotReviewStatus {\n  PENDING\n  APPROVED\n  REJECTED\n\n  @@map(\"shot_review_status\")\n}\n\nenum JobStatus {\n  PENDING\n  RUNNING\n  SUCCEEDED\n  FAILED\n  RETRYING\n}\n\nenum JobType {\n  SHOT_RENDER\n  NOVEL_ANALYSIS\n  // CE Core Layer\n  CE06_NOVEL_PARSING\n  CE03_VISUAL_DENSITY\n  CE04_VISUAL_ENRICHMENT\n}\n\nenum EngineTaskType {\n  scene_parse\n  shot_plan\n  shot_enhance\n  inpainting\n  visual_enhance\n  consistency_calibrate\n\n  @@map(\"engine_task_type\")\n}\n\nenum EngineTaskStatus {\n  pending\n  running\n  success\n  fail\n\n  @@map(\"engine_task_status\")\n}\n\nenum TaskType {\n  NOVEL_IMPORT\n  NOVEL_ANALYSIS\n  SHOT_RENDER\n  CE_CORE_PIPELINE\n}\n\nenum TaskStatus {\n  PENDING\n  RUNNING\n  SUCCEEDED\n  FAILED\n @@map(\"worker_job_status\")\n}\n\nenum WorkerStatus {\n  idle // 空闲\n  busy // 忙碌\n  offline // 离线\n  online // 在线（Orchestrator Stage2，与 idle/busy 可组合使用）\n\n  @@map(\"worker_status\")\n}\n\nenum ModelType {\n  foundation\n  sub_model\n  character\n  pose\n  style\n  embedding\n  lora\n\n  @@map(\"model_type\")\n}\n\nenum TemplateType {\n  pose\n  camera\n  style\n\n  @@map(\"template_type\")\n}\n\nenum RiskLevel {\n  low\n  medium\n  high\n  critical\n\n  @@map(\"risk_level\")\n}\n\nenum ReviewStatus {\n  pass\n  reject\n  require_human_review\n\n  @@map(\"review_status\")\n}\n\nenum BillingEventType {\n  subscription\n  pay_as_you_go\n  organization_billing\n  auto_fix\n  render\n  model_call\n\n  @@map(\"billing_event_type\")\n}\n\nenum BillingStatus {\n  pending\n  completed\n  failed\n\n  @@map(\"billing_status\")\n}\n\nenum ReviewType {\n  auto\n  semi_auto\n  human\n\n  @@map(\"review_type\")\n}\n\nenum ReviewResult {\n  pass\n  reject\n  require_review\n\n  @@map(\"review_result\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Studio v0.7: 组织与多租户体系（补充 OrganizationMember）\n// ============================================\n\nmodel OrganizationMember {\n  id             String           @id @default(uuid())\n  userId         String\n  organizationId String\n  role MEMBER\n\n  @@map(\"organization_role\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Studio: 小说导入体系 (Novel Import System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel NovelSource {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId      String\n  novelTitle     String? // 作品名（从文件名或元数据提取）\n  novelAuthor    String? // 作者（从文件内容或元数据提取）\n  rawText        String   @db.Text // 完整原始文本（UTF-8）\n  filePath       String? // 文件存储路径\n  fileName       String? // 原始文件名\n  fileSize       Int? // 文件大小（字节）\n  fileType       String? // 文件类型：txt, docx, epub, md\n  characterCount Int? // 字符数\n  chapterCount   Int? // 章节数\n  metadata       Json? // 额外元数据（如 EPUB 的 metadata，编码信息等）\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project      Project            @relation(\"ProjectNovelSources\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  analysisJobs NovelAnalysisJob[] @relation(\"NovelSourceAnalysisJobs\")\n  chapters     NovelChapter[]     @relation(\"NovelSourceChapters\")\n\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@map(\"novel_sources\")\n}\n\nmodel NovelChapter {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  novelSourceId  String\n  orderIndex     Int // 章节顺序（从1开始）\n  title          String // 章节标题\n  rawText        String   @db.Text // 章节原始文本（UTF-8）\n  summary        String?  @db.Text // S1-FIX-A: 引擎对章节的摘要，后续由小说分析引擎生成\n  startParagraph Int? // 起始段落索引（在原始文本中的位置）\n  endParagraph   Int? // 结束段落索引\n  characterCount Int? // 章节字符数\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  novelSource NovelSource  @relation(\"NovelSourceChapters\", fields: [novelSourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  sceneDrafts SceneDraft[] @relation(\"ChapterSceneDrafts\")\n  episode     Episode?     @relation(\"ChapterEpisode\") // 关联到 Episode（1章=1集）\n\n  @@unique([novelSourceId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([novelSourceId])\n  @@map(\"novel_chapters\")\n}\n\nmodel SceneDraft {\n  id             String           @id @default(uuid())\n  chapterId      String\n  orderIndex     Int // 场景顺序（从1开始）\n  title          String? // 场景标题\n  summary        String?          @db.Text // 场景摘要（50-80字）\n  characters     Json? // 涉及角色列表 [{ name, role }]\n  location       String? // 地点\n  emotions       Json? // 情绪标签 [{ emotion, intensity }]\n  rawTextRange   Json? // 原文范围 { startParagraph, endParagraph }\n  status         SceneDraftStatus @default(DRAFT) // DRAFT / ANALYZED / FINALIZED\n  analysisResult Json? // LLM分析结果（JSON格式）\n  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  chapter NovelChapter @relation(\"ChapterSceneDrafts\", fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  scene   Scene?       @relation(\"SceneDraftScene\") // 关联到最终 Scene\n\n  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([chapterId])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"scene_drafts\")\n}\n\nenum SceneDraftStatus {\n  DRAFT // 草稿（初始生成）\n  ANALYZED // 已分析（LLM分析完成）\n  FINALIZED // 已确认（用户确认后转为Scene）\n\n  @@map(\"scene_draft_status\")\n}\n\nmodel NovelAnalysisJob {\n  id            String               @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId     String\n  novelSourceId String?\n  chapterId     String? // 如果分析单章，指定章节ID\n  jobType       NovelAnalysisJobType @default(ANALYZE_ALL) // 分析类型：全书或单章\n  status        NovelAnalysisStatus  @default(PENDING)\n  errorMessage  String?              @db.Text\n  progress      Json? // 进度信息 { current, total, message }\n  createdAt     DateTime             @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime             @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project     Project?     @relation(\"ProjectNovelAnalysisJobs\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  novelSource NovelSource? @relation(\"NovelSourceAnalysisJobs\", fields: [novelSourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@index([novelSourceId])\n  @@index([chapterId])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"novel_analysis_jobs\")\n}\n\nenum NovelAnalysisJobType {\n  ANALYZE_ALL // 分析全书\n  ANALYZE_CHAPTER // 分析单章\n\n  @@map(\"novel_analysis_job_type\")\n}\n\nenum NovelAnalysisStatus {\n  PENDING\n  RUNNING\n  DONE\n  FAILED\n\n  @@map(\"novel_analysis_status\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// API Key 安全体系 (API Key Security System)\n// ============================================\n\n// API Key 模型（用于机器/Worker/外部服务认证）\n// 支持 HMAC + Nonce + Timestamp 签名机制\nmodel ApiKey {\n  id          String       @id @default(uuid())\n  key         String       @unique // 公钥 ID（对外暴露，例如：ak_xxx）\n  secretHash  String // 密钥哈希（使用 bcrypt 或类似算法，不存明文）\n  name        String? // 可选的 API Key 名称（便于管理）\n  ownerUserId String? // 可选，关联用户\n  ownerOrgId  String? // 可选，关联组织\n  status      ApiKeyStatus @default(ACTIVE) // 状态：ACTIVE / DISABLED\n  lastUsedAt  DateTime? // 最后使用时间\n  expiresAt   DateTime? // 过期时间（可选）\n  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  ownerUser User?         @relation(\"UserApiKeys\", fields: [ownerUserId], references: [id])\n  ownerOrg  Organization? @relation(\"OrganizationApiKeys\", fields: [ownerOrgId], references: [id])\n  auditLogs AuditLog[]    @relation(\"ApiKeyAuditLogs\") // 审计日志关联\n\n  @@index([key])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@index([ownerUserId])\n  @@index([ownerOrgId])\n  @@map(\"api_keys\")\n}\n\nenum ApiKeyStatus {\n  ACTIVE\n  DISABLED\n\n  @@map(\"api_key_status\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 审计日志体系 (Audit Log System)\n// ============================================\n\n// 审计日志模型（用于记录关键操作）\n// 支持 JWT 用户和 API Key 两种认证来源\nmodel AuditLog {\n  id           String    @id @default(uuid())\n  userId       String? // JWT 用户 ID，可为空\n  apiKeyId     String? // 对应 ApiKey.id，可为空（HMAC 调用场景）\n  action       String // 动作标识：PROJECT_CREATED / TASK_CREATED / JOB_SUCCEEDED 等\n  resourceType String // 资源类型：project / episode / scene / shot / task / job / worker / auth 等\n  resourceId   String? // 资源主键 ID，可为空\n  ip           String? // 请求 IP\n  userAgent    String?   @db.Text // UA 字符串\n  // V1.1: 记录签名相关字段\n  nonce        String?\n  signature    String?\n  timestamp    DateTime?\n  details      Json? // 附加信息（请求参数、结果摘要等）\n  payload      Json? // S1-FIX-A: 规范向 payload：包含 action/resourceType/resourceId/ip/ua/nonce/signature/timestamp/details 等的完整快照\n  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user   User?   @relation(\"UserAuditLogs\", fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  apiKey ApiKey? @relation(\"ApiKeyAuditLogs\", fields: [apiKeyId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@index([action])\n  @@index([resourceType, resourceId])\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([apiKeyId])\n  @@index([nonce, timestamp])\n  @@map(\"audit_logs\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Media & Security (ADD_SAFE per Spec V1.1)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel Asset {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId      String?\n  type           String\n  data @@map(\"assets\")\n}\n\nmodel SecurityFingerprint {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  assetId   String?\n  fpVector  Json?\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  @@map(\"security_fingerprints\")\n}\n\nmodel ShotVariant {\n  id               String   @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId           String?\n  data             Json?\n  consistencyScore Float?\n  visualScore      Float?\n  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"shot_variants\")\n}\n\nmodel VideoJob {\n  id                String   @id packages/database/src/generated/prisma/edge.js:989:  "inlineSchema": "// Prisma Schema for 毛毛虫宇宙 (Super Caterpillar Universe)\n// Based on PLAN - STEP 2: Prisma Schema 顶层结构规划\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n  output   = \"../src/generated/prisma\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 用户体系 (User System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel User {\n  id                    String   @id @default(uuid())\n  email                 String   @unique\n  passwordHash          String\n  avatar                String?\n  userType              UserType @default(individual)\n  role                  UserRole @default(viewer)\n  tier                  UserTier @default(Free)\n  quota                 Json? // { remainingTokens, computeSeconds, credits }\n  defaultOrganizationId String? // Studio v0.7: 默认组织 ID\n  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  memberships         Membership[]         @relation(\"UserMemberships\")\n  ownedProjects       Project[]            @relation(\"ProjectOwner\")\n  ownedOrganizations  Organization[]       @relation(\"OrganizationOwner\")\n  billingEvents       BillingEvent[]       @relation(\"BillingEventUser\")\n  reviewLogs          PublishingReview[]   @relation(\"ReviewerUser\")\n  organizationMembers OrganizationMember[] @relation(\"UserOrganizationMember\") // Studio v0.7\n  apiKeys             ApiKey[]             @relation(\"UserApiKeys\") // API Key 关联\n  auditLogs           AuditLog[]           @relation(\"UserAuditLogs\") // 审计日志关联\n\n  @@map(\"users\")\n}\n\nmodel Organization {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  name      String\n  ownerId   String\n  slug      String?  @unique // Studio v0.7: 可选，用于 URL 或内部标识\n  quota     Json? // { credits, computeSeconds, maxRenderTasks, maxFixAttempts }\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  owner         User                 @relation(\"OrganizationOwner\", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])\n  memberships   Membership[]         @relation(\"OrganizationMemberships\")\n  members       OrganizationMember[] @relation(\"OrganizationMembers\") // Studio v0.7\n  projects      Project[]            @relation(\"OrganizationProjects\")\n  shots         Shot[]               @relation(\"OrganizationShots\") // Studio v0.7\n  shotJobs      ShotJob[]            @relation(\"OrganizationShotJobs\") // Studio v0.7\n  tasks         Task[]               @relation(\"OrganizationTasks\") // Studio v0.8: 平台任务\n  costCenters   CostCenter[]         @relation(\"OrganizationCostCenters\")\n  apiKeys       ApiKey[]             @relation(\"OrganizationApiKeys\") // API Key 关联\n  billingEvents BillingEvent[]       @relation(\"BillingEventOrganization\")\n\n  @@map(\"organizations\")\n}\n\nmodel Membership {\n  id             String         @id @default(uuid())\n  userId         String\n  organizationId String\n  role           MembershipRole\n  permissions    Json? // { projectPermissions: { projectId: [read, write, generate, publish, manage] } }\n  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  user         User         @relation(\"UserMemberships\", fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationMemberships\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n\n  @@unique([userId, organizationId])\n  @@map(\"memberships\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 项目体系 (Project System - 五层内容结构)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel Project {\n  id             String        @id @default(uuid())\n  name           String\n  description    String?\n  ownerId        String\n  organizationId String // Studio v0.7: 所属组织（必填，不再可选）\n  status         ProjectStatus @default(in_progress)\n  metadata       Json? // { timeline, progress, settings }\n  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  owner                  User                    @relation(\"ProjectOwner\", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])\n  organization           Organization            @relation(\"OrganizationProjects\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)\n  seasons                Season[]                @relation(\"ProjectSeasons\") // 影视工业标准：Project → Season → Episode\n  episodes               Episode[]               @relation(\"ProjectEpisodes\") // @deprecated 保留用于向下兼容\n  billingEvents          BillingEvent[]          @relation(\"BillingEventProject\")\n  engineTasks            EngineTask[]            @relation(\"ProjectEngineTask\")\n  tasks                  Task[]                  @relation(\"ProjectTasks\") // Studio v0.8: 平台任务\n  novelSources           NovelSource[]           @relation(\"ProjectNovelSources\") // Studio: 小说导入\n  novelAnalysisJobs      NovelAnalysisJob[]      @relation(\"ProjectNovelAnalysisJobs\") // Studio: 小说分析任务\n  shotJobs               ShotJob[]               @relation(\"ProjectShotJobs\") // ShotJob 关联\n  projectMembers         ProjectMember[]\n  structureQualityReport StructureQualityReport? @relation(\"ProjectQualityReport\")\n  novelParseResults      NovelParseResult[]      @relation(\"ProjectNovelParseResults\")\n  qualityMetrics         QualityMetrics[]        @relation(\"ProjectQualityMetrics\")\n\n  @@map(\"projects\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 影视工业标准层级：Season（季/部）\n// @deprecated 根据 DBSpec V1.1，应使用四层结构（Project → Episode → Scene → Shot）\n// 保留此模型用于向后兼容，新代码应直接使用 Project → Episode 关联\n// ============================================\n\nmodel Season {\n  id          String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId   String\n  index       Int // 季序号（从 1 开始）\n  title       String // 季标题\n  description String?  @db.Text // 季描述\n  metadata    Json?    @default(\"{}\") // 额外元数据\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project  Project   @relation(\"ProjectSeasons\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  episodes Episode[] @relation(\"SeasonEpisodes\")\n\n  @@unique([projectId, index])\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@map(\"seasons\")\n}\n\nmodel Episode {\n  id        String  @id @default(uuid())\n  seasonId  String\n  projectId String?\n  index     Int\n  name      String\n  summary   String?\n  chapterId String? @unique\n\n  season            Season             @relation(\"SeasonEpisodes\", fields: [seasonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  project           Project?           @relation(\"ProjectEpisodes\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  scenes            Scene[]            @relation(\"EpisodeScenes\")\n  shotJobs          ShotJob[]          @relation(\"EpisodeShotJobs\")\n  chapter           NovelChapter?      @relation(\"ChapterEpisode\", fields: [chapterId], references: [id])\n  publishingReviews PublishingReview[] @relation(\"EpisodePublishingReview\")\n\n  @@map(\"episodes\")\n}\n\nmodel Scene {\n  id                 String  @id @default(uuid())\n  episodeId          String\n  index              Int\n  title              String\n  summary            String?\n  // V1.1: 角色 ID 列表（语义层面），存 JSON\n  characters         Json?\n  // V1.1: 视觉密度评分\n  visualDensityScore Float?\n  // V1.1: 文本增强结果\n  enrichedText       String? @db.Text\n\n  episode      Episode      @relation(\"EpisodeScenes\", fields: [episodeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  shots        Shot[]       @relation(\"SceneShots\")\n  shotJobs     ShotJob[]    @relation(\"SceneShotJobs\")\n  engineTasks  EngineTask[] @relation(\"SceneEngineTask\")\n  sceneDraft   SceneDraft?  @relation(\"SceneDraftScene\", fields: [sceneDraftId], references: [id])\n  sceneDraftId String?      @unique\n\n  // 兼容项目级索引需求（Spec: scenes(project_id,index)）\n  projectId String?\n\n  @@index([projectId, index])\n  @@map(\"scenes\")\n}\n\nmodel Shot {\n  id              String    @id @default(uuid())\n  sceneId         String\n  index           Int\n  title           String?\n  description     String?\n  type            String\n  params          Json      @default(\"{}\")\n  qualityScore    Json      @default(\"{}\")\n  reviewedAt      DateTime?\n  durationSeconds Int?\n  organizationId  String?\n  // V1.1: 文本增强后的镜头 prompt\n  enrichedPrompt  String?   @db.Text\n\n  scene             Scene              @relation(\"SceneShots\", fields: [sceneId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  organization      Organization?      @relation(\"OrganizationShots\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n  engineTasks       EngineTask[]       @relation(\"ShotEngineTask\")\n  qualityScores     QualityScore[]     @relation(\"ShotQualityScore\")\n  safetyResults     SafetyResult[]     @relation(\"ShotSafetyResult\")\n  publishingReviews PublishingReview[] @relation(\"ShotPublishingReview\")\n  jobs              ShotJob[]          @relation(\"ShotJobs\")\n  shotPlanning      ShotPlanning?      @relation(\"ShotPlanning\")\n\n  @@index([sceneId, index])\n  @@map(\"shots\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Stage4: Semantic Enhancement / Shot Planning / Structure QA\n// ============================================\n\nmodel SemanticEnhancement {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  nodeType      String\n  nodeId        String\n  data          Json\n  engineKey     String\n  engineVersion String?\n  confidence    Float?\n\n  @@unique([nodeType, nodeId])\n  @@index([nodeType, nodeId])\n  @@map(\"semantic_enhancements\")\n}\n\nmodel ShotPlanning {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId    String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  data          Json\n  engineKey     String\n  engineVersion String?\n  confidence    Float?\n\n  shot Shot @relation(\"ShotPlanning\", fields: [shotId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"shot_plannings\")\n}\n\nmodel StructureQualityReport {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  data          Json\n  engineKey     String\n  engineVersion String?\n\n  project Project @relation(\"ProjectQualityReport\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"structure_quality_reports\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 引擎体系 (EngineHub System)\n// ============================================\n\n// 注意：EngineTask 保留用于向后兼容，新代码应使用 Task 模型\n// EngineTask 主要用于引擎层面的任务记录（scene_parse, shot_plan 等）\nmodel EngineTask {\n  id            String           @id @default(uuid())\n  type          EngineTaskType\n  projectId     String\n  sceneId       String?\n  shotId        String?\n  input         Json // EngineInput { text, projectId, episodeId, sceneId?, historyContext? }\n  output        Json? // EngineOutput { sceneSummary?, shotPlan?, enrichData? }\n  engineVersion String\n  status        EngineTaskStatus @default(pending)\n  createdAt     DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime         @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project Project @relation(\"ProjectEngineTask\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  scene   Scene?  @relation(\"SceneEngineTask\", fields: [sceneId], references: [id])\n  shot    Shot?   @relation(\"ShotEngineTask\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"engine_tasks\")\n}\n\n// S3-B.1: Engine 配置存储（数据库驱动）\nmodel Engine {\n  id             String          @id @default(uuid())\n  engineKey      String          @unique\n  adapterName    String\n  adapterType    String\n  config         Json\n  enabled        Boolean         @default(true)\n  version        String?\n  // S3-B.2: 引擎版本体系\n  defaultVersion String?\n  versions       EngineVersion[]\n  createdAt      DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime        @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"engines\")\n}\n\n// S3-B.2: Engine 版本表\nmodel EngineVersion {\n  id            String   @id @default(uuid())\n  engine        Engine   @relation(fields: [engineId], references: [id])\n  engineId      String\n  versionName   String\n  config        Json\n  enabled       Boolean  @default(true)\n  rolloutWeight Int?\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  @@unique([engineId, versionName])\n  @@map(\"engine_versions\")\n}\n\n/// Nonce 防重放存储（HMAC 安全）\nmodel NonceStore {\n  id        String    @id @default(uuid())\n  nonce     String\n  apiKey    String\n  timestamp BigInt\n  usedAt    DateTime?\n  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())\n\n  @@unique([nonce, apiKey])\n  @@map(\"nonce_store\")\n}\n\n// RBAC 基础表\nmodel Role {\n  id        String           @id @default(uuid())\n  name      String           @unique\n  level     Int\n  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime         @updatedAt\n  members   ProjectMember[]\n  rolePerms RolePermission[]\n\n  @@map(\"roles\")\n}\n\nmodel Permission {\n  id        String           @id @default(uuid())\n  key       String           @unique\n  scope     String // system | project\n  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime         @updatedAt\n  rolePerms RolePermission[]\n\n  @@map(\"permissions\")\n}\n\nmodel RolePermission {\n  id           String   @id @default(uuid())\n  roleId       String\n  permissionId String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n\n  role       Role       @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  permission Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])\n  @@map(\"role_permissions\")\n}\n\nmodel ProjectMember {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  userId    String\n  projectId String\n  roleId    String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  project Project @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  role    Role    @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([userId, projectId])\n  @@map(\"project_members\")\n}\n\n// 审计日志（Append-only）\nmodel AuditLogLegacy {\n  id           String   @id @default(uuid())\n  userId       String?\n  orgId        String?\n  action       String\n  resourceType String?\n  resourceId   String?\n  traceId      String\n  ip           String?\n  ua           String?\n  timestamp    DateTime @default(now())\n  details      Json?\n  immutable    Boolean  @default(true)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([resourceId])\n  @@index([action])\n  @@index([timestamp])\n  @@map(\"audit_log\")\n  @@ignore\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 任务与调度体系 (TaskSystem & WorkerPool)\n// ============================================\n\n// Task（平台级任务）\n// 定义：跨 Worker、跨重试、带业务语义的任务\n// 职责：包含任务类型、业务对象关联、重试策略、优先级等平台级元信息\n// 关系：Task → Job（一个 Task 可以产生多个 Job，用于重试）\nmodel Task {\n  id             String     @id @default(uuid())\n  organizationId String\n  projectId      String\n  type           TaskType\n  status         TaskStatus @default(PENDING)\n  payload        Json?\n  output         Json? // 任务输出结果，Engine/Worker 执行完成后写入\n  attempts       Int        @default(0)\n  maxRetry       Int        @default(3)\n  retryCount     Int        @default(0)\n  error          String?\n  workerId       String? // 实际执行该 Task 的 Worker 节点 ID\n  traceId        String? // Stage13-Final: Pipeline 级 traceId（用于 CE Core Layer 审计追溯）\n  createdAt      DateTime   @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime   @updatedAt\n\n  jobs ShotJob[] @relation(\"TaskJobs\")\n\n  project      Project      @relation(\"ProjectTasks\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationTasks\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n  worker       WorkerNode?  @relation(\"TaskWorker\", fields: [workerId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([status, createdAt])\n}\n\n// WorkerJob（Worker 执行记录）\n// 定义：Worker 维度的一次具体执行记录\n// 职责：记录 Worker 执行任务的过程和结果\n// 关系：WorkerJob 与 Task/Job 是不同层面的概念，WorkerJob 主要用于 Worker 内部调度和计费\nmodel WorkerJob {\n  id            String          @id @default(uuid())\n  type          WorkerJobType\n  payload       Json // { taskData, params, modelInfo }\n  status        WorkerJobStatus @default(pending)\n  workerId      String?\n  retryCount    Int             @default(0)\n  traceId       String\n  jobId         String          @unique // BullMQ jobId\n  engineVersion String?\n  modelVersion  String?\n  createdAt     DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime        @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  worker        WorkerNode?    @relation(\"WorkerNodeJobs\", fields: [workerId], references: [id])\n  billingEvents BillingEvent[] @relation(\"BillingEventJob\")\n\n  @@map(\"worker_jobs\")\n}\n\n// Job（Worker 执行单元）\n// 定义：某个 Worker 在某个时间执行某个 Task 的一次尝试\n// 职责：记录单次执行的状态、结果、错误信息等\n// 关系：Job 属于某个 Task（taskId），一个 Task 可以产生多个 Job（用于重试）\n// Studio v0.2: Shot 生成任务模型\n// Studio v0.4: 增强队列化处理能力\n// Studio v0.8: 引入 Task 层，Job 关联 Task\nmodel ShotJob {\n  id             String    @id @default(uuid())\n  organizationId String\n  projectId      String\n  episodeId      String\n  sceneId        String\n  shotId         String\n  taskId         String?\n  workerId       String?\n  status         JobStatus @default(PENDING)\n  type           JobType\n  priority       Int       @default(0)\n  maxRetry       Int       @default(3)\n  retryCount     Int       @default(0)\n  attempts       Int       @default(0)\n  payload        Json?\n  engineConfig   Json?\n  lastError      String?\n  traceId        String? // Stage13: 用于 CE Core Layer 审计追溯\n  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  shot         Shot         @relation(\"ShotJobs\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n  task         Task?        @relation(\"TaskJobs\", fields: [taskId], references: [id])\n  worker       WorkerNode?  @relation(\"WorkerNodeShotJobs\", fields: [workerId], references: [id])\n  project      Project      @relation(\"ProjectShotJobs\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  episode      Episode      @relation(\"EpisodeShotJobs\", fields: [episodeId], references: [id])\n  scene        Scene        @relation(\"SceneShotJobs\", fields: [sceneId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationShotJobs\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n}\n\nmodel WorkerNode {\n  id            String       @id @default(uuid())\n  workerId      String       @unique\n  name          String? // Worker 名称（可选）\n  status        WorkerStatus @default(offline)\n  gpuCount      Int          @default(0)\n  gpuMemory     Int          @default(0)\n  gpuType       String       @default(\"unknown\")\n  tasksRunning  Int          @default(0)\n  temperature   Float?\n  capabilities  Json         @default(\"{}\") // { supportedJobTypes[], supportedModels[], maxBatchSize }\n  lastHeartbeat DateTime     @default(now())\n  createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  jobs     WorkerJob[] @relation(\"WorkerNodeJobs\")\n  shotJobs ShotJob[]   @relation(\"WorkerNodeShotJobs\") // Orchestrator Stage2: 关联 ShotJob\n  tasks    Task[]      @relation(\"TaskWorker\") // S1-FIX-A: Task 关联 Worker\n\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"worker_nodes\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 模型宇宙体系 (Model Universe System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel ModelRegistry {\n  id                 String    @id @default(uuid())\n  name               String\n  type               ModelType\n  version            String\n  changelog          String?\n  compatibleEngines  Json // { engines: [CE01, CE02, ...] }\n  performanceMetrics Json? // { latency, accuracy, cost }\n  fineTuneInfo       Json? // { method, dataset, params }\n  seed               String?\n  createdAt          DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  @@unique([name, version])\n  @@map(\"model_registry\")\n}\n\nmodel TemplatePreset {\n  id        String       @id @default(uuid())\n  type      TemplateType\n  name      String\n  preset    Json // 根据类型不同，包含 pose 参数、camera 参数、style 参数\n  createdAt DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"template_presets\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 质量与安全体系 (Quality & Safety System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel QualityScore {\n  id                 String   @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId             String\n  visualDensityScore Float\n  consistencyScore   Float\n  motionScore        Float\n  clarityScore       Float\n  aestheticScore     Float\n  overallScore       Float\n  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  shot Shot @relation(\"ShotQualityScore\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"quality_scores\")\n}\n\nmodel SafetyResult {\n  id           String       @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId       String\n  textScore    Float\n  imageScore   Float\n  riskLevel    RiskLevel\n  reviewStatus ReviewStatus @default(require_human_review)\n  createdAt    DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  shot Shot @relation(\"ShotSafetyResult\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"safety_results\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 商业化体系 (Billing System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel BillingEvent {\n  id                 String           @id @default(uuid())\n  eventType          BillingEventType\n  userId             String\n  organizationId     String?\n  projectId          String?\n  jobId              String?\n  amount             Float\n  creditsConsumed    Float\n  computeSecondsUsed Float\n  gpuCost            Float\n  modelCost          Float\n  storageCost        Float\n  totalCost          Float\n  billingStatus      BillingStatus    @default(pending)\n  invoiceId          String?\n  timestamp          DateTime         @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user         User          @relation(\"BillingEventUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  organization Organization? @relation(\"BillingEventOrganization\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n  project      Project?      @relation(\"BillingEventProject\", fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  job          WorkerJob?    @relation(\"BillingEventJob\", fields: [jobId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"billing_events\")\n}\n\nmodel CostCenter {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  organizationId String\n  name           String\n  budget         Float\n  currentCost    Float    @default(0)\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  organization Organization @relation(\"OrganizationCostCenters\", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"cost_centers\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 发布体系 (Publishing System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel PublishingReview {\n  id         String       @id @default(uuid())\n  episodeId  String?\n  shotId     String?\n  reviewType ReviewType\n  reviewerId String?\n  result     ReviewResult\n  reviewLog  Json // { reviewSteps[], comments[], timestamps[] }\n  createdAt  DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt  DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  episode  Episode? @relation(\"EpisodePublishingReview\", fields: [episodeId], references: [id])\n  shot     Shot?    @relation(\"ShotPublishingReview\", fields: [shotId], references: [id])\n  reviewer User?    @relation(\"ReviewerUser\", fields: [reviewerId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"publishing_reviews\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Enums\n// ============================================\n\nenum UserType {\n  individual\n  organization_member\n  admin\n\n  @@map(\"user_type\")\n}\n\nenum UserRole {\n  viewer\n  editor\n  creator\n  admin\n\n  @@map(\"user_role\")\n}\n\nenum UserTier {\n  Free\n  Pro\n  Studio\n  Enterprise\n\n  @@map(\"user_tier\")\n}\n\nenum MembershipRole {\n  Owner\n  Editor\n  Creator\n  Viewer\n\n  @@map(\"membership_role\")\n}\n\nenum ProjectStatus {\n  in_progress\n  completed\n\n  @@map(\"project_status\")\n}\n\nenum ShotStatus {\n  DRAFT\n  READY\n  GENERATING\n  GENERATED\n  FAILED\n  // Legacy statuses (保持向后兼容)\n  pending\n  running\n  success\n  fail\n  need_fix\n\n  @@map(\"shot_status\")\n}\n\nenum ShotReviewStatus {\n  PENDING\n  APPROVED\n  REJECTED\n\n  @@map(\"shot_review_status\")\n}\n\nenum JobStatus {\n  PENDING\n  RUNNING\n  SUCCEEDED\n  FAILED\n  RETRYING\n}\n\nenum JobType {\n  SHOT_RENDER\n  NOVEL_ANALYSIS\n  // CE Core Layer\n  CE06_NOVEL_PARSING\n  CE03_VISUAL_DENSITY\n  CE04_VISUAL_ENRICHMENT\n}\n\nenum EngineTaskType {\n  scene_parse\n  shot_plan\n  shot_enhance\n  inpainting\n  visual_enhance\n  consistency_calibrate\n\n  @@map(\"engine_task_type\")\n}\n\nenum EngineTaskStatus {\n  pending\n  running\n  success\n  fail\n\n  @@map(\"engine_task_status\")\n}\n\nenum TaskType {\n  NOVEL_IMPORT\n  NOVEL_ANALYSIS\n  SHOT_RENDER\n  CE_CORE_PIPELINE\n}\n\nenum TaskStatus {\n  PENDING\n  RUNNING\n  SUCCEEDED\n  FAILED\n  RETRYING\n}\n\nenum WorkerJobType {\n  render\n  engine_task\n  synthesis\n  fix\n\n  @@map(\"worker_job_type\")\n}\n\nenum WorkerJobStatus {\n  pending\n  running\n  success\n  fail\n\n  @@map(\"worker_job_status\")\n}\n\nenum WorkerStatus {\n  idle // 空闲\n  busy // 忙碌\n  offline // 离线\n  online // 在线（Orchestrator Stage2，与 idle/busy 可组合使用）\n\n  @@map(\"worker_status\")\n}\n\nenum ModelType {\n  foundation\n  sub_model\n  character\n  pose\n  style\n  embedding\n  lora\n\n  @@map(\"model_type\")\n}\n\nenum TemplateType {\n  pose\n  camera\n  style\n\n  @@map(\"template_type\")\n}\n\nenum RiskLevel {\n  low\n  medium\n  high\n  critical\n\n  @@map(\"risk_level\")\n}\n\nenum ReviewStatus {\n  pass\n  reject\n  require_human_review\n\n  @@map(\"review_status\")\n}\n\nenum BillingEventType {\n  subscription\n  pay_as_you_go\n  organization_billing\n  auto_fix\n  render\n  model_call\n\n  @@map(\"billing_event_type\")\n}\n\nenum BillingStatus {\n  pending\n  completed\n  failed\n\n  @@map(\"billing_status\")\n}\n\nenum ReviewType {\n  auto\n  semi_auto\n  human\n\n  @@map(\"review_type\")\n}\n\nenum ReviewResult {\n  pass\n  reject\n  require_review\n\n  @@map(\"review_result\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Studio v0.7: 组织与多租户体系（补充 OrganizationMember）\n// ============================================\n\nmodel OrganizationMember {\n  id             String           @id @default(uuid())\n  userId         String\n  organizationId String\n  role onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([userId, organizationId])\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([organizationId])\n  @@map(\"organization_members\")\n}\n\nenum OrganizationRole {\n  OWNER\n  ADMIN\n  MEMBER\n\n  @@map(\"organization_role\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Studio: 小说导入体系 (Novel Import System)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel NovelSource {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId      String\n  novelTitle     String? // 作品名（从文件名或元数据提取）\n  novelAuthor    String? // 作者（从文件内容或元数据提取）\n  rawText        String   @db.Text // 完整原始文本（UTF-8）\n  filePath       String? // 文件存储路径\n  fileName       String? // 原始文件名\n  fileSize       Int? // 文件大小（字节）\n  fileType       String? // 文件类型：txt, docx, epub, md\n  characterCount Int? // 字符数\n  chapterCount   Int? // 章节数\n  metadata       Json? // 额外元数据（如 EPUB 的 metadata，编码信息等）\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project      Project            @relation(\"ProjectNovelSources\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  analysisJobs NovelAnalysisJob[] @relation(\"NovelSourceAnalysisJobs\")\n  chapters     NovelChapter[]     @relation(\"NovelSourceChapters\")\n\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@map(\"novel_sources\")\n}\n\nmodel NovelChapter {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  novelSourceId  String\n  orderIndex     Int // 章节顺序（从1开始）\n  title          String // 章节标题\n  rawText        String   @db.Text // 章节原始文本（UTF-8）\n  summary        String?  @db.Text // S1-FIX-A: 引擎对章节的摘要，后续由小说分析引擎生成\n  startParagraph Int? // 起始段落索引（在原始文本中的位置）\n  endParagraph   Int? // 结束段落索引\n  characterCount Int? // 章节字符数\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  novelSource NovelSource  @relation(\"NovelSourceChapters\", fields: [novelSourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  sceneDrafts SceneDraft[] @relation(\"ChapterSceneDrafts\")\n  episode     Episode?     @relation(\"ChapterEpisode\") // 关联到 Episode（1章=1集）\n\n  @@unique([novelSourceId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([novelSourceId])\n  @@map(\"novel_chapters\")\n}\n\nmodel SceneDraft {\n  id             String           @id @default(uuid())\n  chapterId      String\n  orderIndex     Int // 场景顺序（从1开始）\n  title          String? // 场景标题\n  summary        String?          @db.Text // 场景摘要（50-80字）\n  characters     Json? // 涉及角色列表 [{ name, role }]\n  location       String? // 地点\n  emotions       Json? // 情绪标签 [{ emotion, intensity }]\n  rawTextRange   Json? // 原文范围 { startParagraph, endParagraph }\n  status         SceneDraftStatus @default(DRAFT) // DRAFT / ANALYZED / FINALIZED\n  analysisResult Json? // LLM分析结果（JSON格式）\n  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  chapter NovelChapter @relation(\"ChapterSceneDrafts\", fields: [chapterId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  scene   Scene?       @relation(\"SceneDraftScene\") // 关联到最终 Scene\n\n  @@unique([chapterId, orderIndex])\n  @@index([chapterId])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"scene_drafts\")\n}\n\nenum SceneDraftStatus {\n  DRAFT // 草稿（初始生成）\n  ANALYZED // 已分析（LLM分析完成）\n  FINALIZED // 已确认（用户确认后转为Scene）\n\n  @@map(\"scene_draft_status\")\n}\n\nmodel NovelAnalysisJob {\n  id            String               @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId     String\n  novelSourceId String?\n  chapterId     String? // 如果分析单章，指定章节ID\n  jobType       NovelAnalysisJobType @default(ANALYZE_ALL) // 分析类型：全书或单章\n  status        NovelAnalysisStatus  @default(PENDING)\n  errorMessage  String?              @db.Text\n  progress      Json? // 进度信息 { current, total, message }\n  createdAt     DateTime             @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime             @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  project     Project?     @relation(\"ProjectNovelAnalysisJobs\", fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  novelSource NovelSource? @relation(\"NovelSourceAnalysisJobs\", fields: [novelSourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([projectId])\n  @@index([novelSourceId])\n  @@index([chapterId])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"novel_analysis_jobs\")\n}\n\nenum NovelAnalysisJobType {\n  ANALYZE_ALL // 分析全书\n  ANALYZE_CHAPTER // 分析单章\n\n  @@map(\"novel_analysis_job_type\")\n}\n\nenum NovelAnalysisStatus {\n  PENDING\n  RUNNING\n  DONE\n  FAILED\n\n  @@map(\"novel_analysis_status\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// API Key 安全体系 (API Key Security System)\n// ============================================\n\n// API Key 模型（用于机器/Worker/外部服务认证）\n// 支持 HMAC + Nonce + Timestamp 签名机制\nmodel ApiKey {\n  id          String       @id @default(uuid())\n  key         String       @unique // 公钥 ID（对外暴露，例如：ak_xxx）\n  secretHash  String // 密钥哈希（使用 bcrypt 或类似算法，不存明文）\n  name        String? // 可选的 API Key 名称（便于管理）\n  ownerUserId String? // 可选，关联用户\n  ownerOrgId  String? // 可选，关联组织\n  status      ApiKeyStatus @default(ACTIVE) // 状态：ACTIVE / DISABLED\n  lastUsedAt  DateTime? // 最后使用时间\n  expiresAt   DateTime? // 过期时间（可选）\n  createdAt   DateTime     @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime     @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  ownerUser User?         @relation(\"UserApiKeys\", fields: [ownerUserId], references: [id])\n  ownerOrg  Organization? @relation(\"OrganizationApiKeys\", fields: [ownerOrgId], references: [id])\n  auditLogs AuditLog[]    @relation(\"ApiKeyAuditLogs\") // 审计日志关联\n\n  @@index([key])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@index([ownerUserId])\n  @@index([ownerOrgId])\n  @@map(\"api_keys\")\n}\n\nenum ApiKeyStatus {\n  ACTIVE\n  DISABLED\n\n  @@map(\"api_key_status\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// 审计日志体系 (Audit Log System)\n// ============================================\n\n// 审计日志模型（用于记录关键操作）\n// 支持 JWT 用户和 API Key 两种认证来源\nmodel AuditLog {\n  id           String    @id @default(uuid())\n  userId       String? // JWT 用户 ID，可为空\n  apiKeyId     String? // 对应 ApiKey.id，可为空（HMAC 调用场景）\n  action       String // 动作标识：PROJECT_CREATED / TASK_CREATED / JOB_SUCCEEDED 等\n  resourceType String // 资源类型：project / episode / scene / shot / task / job / worker / auth 等\n  resourceId   String? // 资源主键 ID，可为空\n  ip           String? // 请求 IP\n  userAgent    String?   @db.Text // UA 字符串\n  // V1.1: 记录签名相关字段\n  nonce        String?\n  signature    String?\n  timestamp    DateTime?\n  details      Json? // 附加信息（请求参数、结果摘要等）\n  payload      Json? // S1-FIX-A: 规范向 payload：包含 action/resourceType/resourceId/ip/ua/nonce/signature/timestamp/details 等的完整快照\n  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user   User?   @relation(\"UserAuditLogs\", fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  apiKey ApiKey? @relation(\"ApiKeyAuditLogs\", fields: [apiKeyId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@index([action])\n  @@index([resourceType, resourceId])\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([apiKeyId])\n  @@index([nonce, timestamp])\n  @@map(\"audit_logs\")\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// Media & Security (ADD_SAFE per Spec V1.1)\n// ============================================\n\nmodel Asset {\n  id             String   @id @default(uuid())\n  projectId      String?\n  type           String\n  data @@map(\"assets\")\n}\n\nmodel SecurityFingerprint {\n  id        String   @id @default(uuid())\n  assetId   String?\n  fpVector  Json?\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  @@map(\"security_fingerprints\")\n}\n\nmodel ShotVariant {\n  id               String   @id @default(uuid())\n  shotId           String?\n  data             Json?\n  consistencyScore Float?\n  visualScore      Float?\n  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  @@map(\"shot_variants\")\n}\n\nmodel VideoJob {\n  id                String   @id packages/config/src/env.ts:84:  HMAC_TIMESTAMP_WINDOW: getEnvNumber('HMAC_TIMESTAMP_WINDOW', 300000),
packages/config/src/env.ts:85:  // HMAC_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM: 签名算法，默认 sha256
packages/config/src/env.ts:86:  HMAC_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM: getEnv('HMAC_SIGNATURE_ALGORITHM', 'sha256'),
